expectedExtraction.insurerName: Star Health and Allied Insurance Co Ltd

expectedAppealCitations: The patient's policy was incepted on 15-Jan-2022, meaning she has completed 26 months of continuous coverage.
The maternity waiting period under the Star MediClassic Policy is 24 months, which has been fully served.

IRDAI Guidelines on Standardization of Exclusions state that maternity benefits cannot be denied using Pre-Existing Disease (PED) exclusion clauses for a physiological condition or prior obstetric scar.
A previous cesarean delivery scar (ICD-10 O34.2) is an obstetric condition and does not constitute a pre-existing chronic illness or deformity under Clause 4.1.
